2605.06165.title: Post Reasoning: Improving the Performance of Non-Thinking Models at No Cost
2605.06165.paper_summary: As the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) accelerates, token consumption from intermediate reasoning traces increasingly contributes to inference latency and operational cost. Recent studies suggest that many real-world tasks require little to no explicit reasoning, with additional reasoning sometimes even degrading performance. In this work, we propose \textbf{Post-Reasoning}, a simple yet effective approach that improves instruction-tuned models by conditioning them to justify their answers after generating the final response. By design, it enables the final answer to be obtained without additional latency or token cost, while still improving performance through simple instruction augmentation. We evaluate Post-Reasoning across \(117\) model--benchmark settings spanning \(13\) open and proprietary models, \(4\) model families, and \(9\) diverse reasoning and knowledge-intensive benchmarks, including AMC, HMMT, GSM8K, GPQA, MMLU-Pro, and BIG-Bench Hard. Post-Reasoning improves performance in over \(88.19\%\) of evaluated settings, achieving a mean relative improvements of \(17.37\%\). Furthermore, we propose supervised post-reason tuning, which further improves performance in over \(91.11\%\) of evaluated settings, and exceeds the prompt-based post-reasoning baseline by an average of \(8.01\%\), demonstrating that post-reasoning can be effectively internalized through training. Ultimately, Post-Reasoning establishes a new performance ceiling for direct-answer capabilities.
2605.06165.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）的廣泛採用加速，來自中間推理痕跡的標記消耗越來越多地影響推理延遲和運營成本。最近的研究表明，許多現實世界的任務幾乎不需要明確的推理，額外的推理有時甚至會降低性能。在這項工作中，我們提出了\textbf{Post-Reasoning}，這是一種簡單但有效的方法，通過在生成最終回應後使模型能夠為其答案提供理由來改善指令調整模型。從設計上講，它使最終答案能夠在不增加延遲或標記成本的情況下獲得，同時通過簡單的指令增強來提高性能。我們在\(117\)個模型-基準設置中評估了Post-Reasoning，涵蓋了\(13\)個開放和專有模型、\(4\)個模型系列以及\(9\)個多樣的推理和知識密集型基準，包括AMC、HMMT、GSM8K、GPQA、MMLU-Pro和BIG-Bench Hard。Post-Reasoning在超過\(88.19\%\)的評估設置中提高了性能，實現了平均相對改善\(17.37\%\)。此外，我們提出了監督後推理調整，這進一步提高了超過\(91.11\%\)的評估設置中的性能，並且平均超過基於提示的後推理基準\(8.01\%\)，證明後推理可以通過訓練有效內化。最終，Post-Reasoning為直接回答能力建立了一個新的性能上限。
2605.06165.author: Richmond Sin Jing Xuan et.al.
2605.06165.authors: Richmond Sin Jing Xuan, Rishabh Bhardwaj, Soujanya Poria
